---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / use case
What are you trying to do, and what's getting in the way today?

## Proposed solution
What would you like LabelHub to do?

## Alternatives considered
Any workarounds or other approaches you've thought about.

## Additional context
Mockups, examples from other tools, or anything else that helps.
